name: Dynamic Yield
description: Dynamic Yield — Personalization platform with AI recommendations, A/B testing, and content targeting.

seo.title: Dynamic Yield — Search / Recommendations API
seo.meta_description: Dynamic Yield: Dynamic Yield — Personalization platform with AI recommendations, A/B testing, and content targeting.

when_to_use: AI product recommendations for e-commerce homepage
A/B test personalized content variants at scale
Behavioral targeting for banner and email personalization
Real-time segment-based content targeting for retail

pros: Unified personalization, recs, and A/B testing in one stack
Strong segmentation engine for cross-channel experiences
Proven at scale with large retail and QSR brands
Product intelligence team offers real optimization consulting
cons: Enterprise pricing and long sales cycles
Complex to configure without dedicated CRO team
Feature breadth means nothing is truly best-in-class
Ownership changes (McDonald's, Mastercard) caused strategy churn
review.verdict: Full-stack personalization for big brands with dedicated experimentation teams, but heavy and expensive for lean shops.
review.best_for: Enterprise retailers and QSRs running mature personalization and experimentation programs.
review.not_for: SMBs or teams wanting a lightweight, self-serve personalization tool.
